description_long: This object consists of two semi-automatic handguns and two detachable magazines, all rendered in a stylized, low-poly form. The handguns feature a predominantly matte gray finish with dark blue grips and angular, modern contours. The slides are long and squared, with visible serrations at the rear for improved handling, and the barrels are extended with prominent front and rear sights. The magazines are depicted as separate components, with one showing a visible copper-colored cartridge at the top. The trigger guards are robust and slightly squared, while the grips are solid and ergonomic, lacking visible texturing. No manufacturer markings or decorative engravings are apparent on the slides or frames.
description: A pair of modern, angular semi-automatic handguns with matte gray slides, dark blue grips, and two detachable magazines, one showing a visible cartridge. The design is sleek and minimalistic, with extended barrels and squared trigger guards.
description_view_0: Two handguns are seen from a front angle, highlighting the muzzle openings, front sights, and the squared trigger guards, with magazines positioned below.
description_view_1: A clear side profile of both handguns and magazines, showing the full length of the slides, the grip contours, and the magazine's copper-colored cartridge.
description_view_2: A direct front view of the handguns, emphasizing the barrel openings, front sights, and the alignment of the magazines below.
description_view_3: A rear-side perspective displaying the back of the slides, rear sights, and the full length of the magazines, with the handguns' ergonomic grips visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is solid and angular, finished in a dark blue color with a smooth, untextured surface. It appears to be made of polymer, contoured for ergonomic handling but lacking finger grooves, checkering, or stippling. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or unique design elements on the grip, giving it a minimalistic and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared, with a thick profile and a straight lower edge. It lacks undercuts or integrated accessories, and there is no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, providing ample space for finger placement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a standard profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior is finished in matte gray, matching the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with only the slide serrations at the rear providing any visual detail.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with a slight bevel at the edges. It is simple in design, lacking finger rests, flaring, or logos, and is finished in a matching gray color with a visible copper cartridge at the top of one magazine.
